items.title: Pope Leo criticises Equatorial Guinea prisons as he winds up Africa tour
items.dek: The Pope gives a frank and passionate speech, the likes of which have characterised his tour of Africa.
items.body: The Pope gives a frank and passionate speech, the likes of which have characterised his tour of Africa.

items.title: US and Iran in blockade standoff as Pakistan pushes for talks

items.title: Billionaire backer sues Trump family's crypto firm over alleged extortion
items.dek: Billionaire investor Justin Sun is suing the family's World Liberty crypto venture after spending $45m on its tokens.
items.body: Billionaire investor Justin Sun is suing the family's World Liberty crypto venture after spending $45m on its tokens.
